Current time: Saturday, May 9th, 2026 — 4:57 PM (America/Chicago)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
I'll sync the local repos to GitHub. Let me first check what repos are available and their current status.

arguments.command:
# Check other git repos that might need syncing
for dir in /Users/landonking/VisionClaw /Users/landonking/hermes-agent /Users/landonking/obsidian-vault; do
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    echo "=== $dir ==="
    cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>&1 | wc -l && git remote -v 2>&1 | head -2
  fi
done
